summary: Vertical handheld footage of a single ICE arrest: an agent in a tactical vest handcuffs a man in a teal shirt and paint-stained jeans beside a vehicle at golden hour, the detainee's face blurred. There are no added graphics or montage editing, and the music_score is very low (0.33). It is one continuous arrest clip. The self-deport stipend statements appear only in the tweet text. On-screen and tweet text includes (tweet only) 'it's time to self-deport', 'Skip the ICE arrest', 'Get a free flight home', and 'Receive a $1,000 stipend'.
notable_text: (tweet only) it's time to self-deport; Skip the ICE arrest; Get a free flight home; Receive a $1,000 stipend
